metadata.title: PDF++
metadata.description: The most Obsidian-native PDF annotation tool ever.

regex.target: .setName("悬停同步 (反向链接面板 \u2192 PDF查看器) 的高亮颜色")

regex.source: .setName("Open PDF links in Obsidian as well")
.setName("Focus Obsidian after opening a PDF file with an external app")
regex.target: .setName("使用外部应用程序打开PDF文件后聚焦于Obsidian")

regex.source: .setName("Minimum update interval of the View Sync file (sec)")
regex.target: .setName("视图同步文件的最小更新间隔 (秒)")

regex.source: .setName("Enter outline mode when opening PDF outline view")
regex.target: .setName("打开PDF大纲视图时进入大纲模式")

regex.source: .setName("Enable Vim keys in PDF context menus")
.setName("Remove half-width whitespace between two Chinese/Japanese characters when copying text")
regex.target: .setName("复制文本时移除两个中文/日文字符之间的半角空格")

regex.source: .setName("Override the default copy behavior in the PDF viewer")
regex.target: .setName("覆盖PDF查看器中的默认复制行为")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can choose a color from the color picker or select one from your custom named colors.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以从颜色选择器中选择颜色,也可以从您的自定义命名颜色中选择.")

regex.source: .setDesc('Tip: There is an option called "Render markdown in annotation popups when the annotation has text contents".')
regex.target: .setDesc('提示: 有一个选项叫做"当注释包含文本内容时,在注释弹出窗口中渲染Markdown".')

regex.source: .setDesc("This PDF document does not have any page labels.")
.setDesc("The index of the first page in this range.")
.setDesc("The index of the last page in this range.")
.setDesc('Type the path in the input box or click the "Browse" button to select the file.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在输入框中键入路径,或点击"浏览"按钮选择文件.')

regex.source:
.setDesc(`If you find PDF++ helpful, please consider supporting the development to help me keep this plugin alive.

If you prefer PayPal, please make donations via Ko-fi. Thank you!`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果您觉得PDF++有用,请考虑支持开发,帮助我维持这个插件的运行。

如果您更喜欢PayPal,可以通过Ko-fi捐款。谢谢！`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Currently ${r?"required":"not required"}. You can toggle this on and off in the core Page Preview plugin settings > ${i}.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`目前${r?"需要":"不需要"}。您可以在核心页面预览插件设置 > ${i} 中开启或关闭此功能。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("It must contain at least one character in order to make annotations referenceable & editable within Obsidian.")
regex.target: .setDesc("它必须至少包含一个字符,以便在Obsidian中引用和编辑注释。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Annotate PDF files with highlights just by linking to text selection. You can easily copy links to selections using color palette in the toolbar. See the "Color palette" section for the details.')
regex.target: .setDesc('通过链接到文本选择来标注PDF文件。您可以使用工具栏中的颜色调色板轻松复制选择的链接。详细信息请参阅“颜色调色板”部分。')

regex.source: .setDesc("In the PDF viewer, any referenced text will be highlighted for easy identification.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在PDF查看器中,任何引用的文本都会被高亮显示,便于识别。")

regex.source: .setDesc("How backlinks to a text selection should be visualized.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如何可视化指向文本选择的反向链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Easily open backlinks or display a popover preview of it by pressing ${Tn("Mod").toLowerCase()} (by default) while hovering over a highlighted text in PDF viewer.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`在PDF查看器中悬浮在高亮文本上时,按住${Tn("Mod").toLowerCase()}（默认）即可轻松打开反向链接或显示其弹出预览。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`If turned on, the ${this.plugin.settings.paneTypeForFirstMDLeaf==="left-sidebar"?"left":"right"} sidebar will be used whether there is existing markdown tabs or not.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果开启,无论是否存在markdown标签页,都将使用${this.plugin.settings.paneTypeForFirstMDLeaf==="left-sidebar"?"左侧":"右侧"}侧边栏。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn this on if you want to open markdown files in a single pane in the sidebar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果希望在侧边栏的单个窗格中打开markdown文件,请开启此选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If some notes are opened in the ignored splits, PDF++ will still open the backlink in the way specified in the previous setting. For example, you might want to ignore the left sidebar if you are pinning a certain note (e.g. daily note) in it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果某些笔记在被忽略的分割中打开,PDF++仍将按照前面设置的方式打开反向链接。例如,如果您在其中固定了某个笔记（如每日笔记）,可能希望忽略左侧边栏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This option will be ignored when you open a link in a tab in the same split as the current tab.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当您在与当前标签相同的分割中打开链接时,此选项将被忽略。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If no color is specified in link text, this color will be used.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果链接文本中未指定颜色,则将使用此颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Bounding rectangles will be shown for annotations with backlinks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("具有反向链接的注释将显示边界矩形。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show icons for text selections, annotations, offsets and rectangular selections with backlinks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("为带有反向链接的文本选择、注释、偏移量和矩形选择显示图标。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The higher the value, the better the rendering quality, but the longer time it takes to render. The default value is 100.")
regex.target: .setDesc("值越高,渲染质量越好,但渲染所需时间越长。默认值为100。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By default, rectangular selection embeds are re-rendered every time you open the markdown file, which can slow down the loading time. Turn on this option to replace them with static images and improve the performance.")
regex.target: .setDesc("默认情况下,每次打开markdown文件时都会重新渲染矩形选择嵌入,这可能会减慢加载速度。开启此选项以静态图像替换它们,从而提高性能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the name of the color selected in the color palette will be included in the link text. As a result, the rectangular selection will be highlighted with the specified color in the PDF viewer.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后,所选颜色名称将包含在链接文本中。因此,在PDF查看器中,矩形选择将以指定的颜色高亮显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("(Not supported on smartphones) When enabled, the dropdown menus (\u2304) in the PDF toolbar will be opened by hovering over the icon, and you don't need to click it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("(不支持智能手机) 启用后,PDF工具栏中的下拉菜单 (\u2304) 将通过悬浮在图标上来打开,而无需点击。")

regex.source: .setDesc("A input box will be added to the PDF toolbar, which indicated the current zoom level and allows you to set the zoom level by typing a number.")
regex.target: .setDesc("PDF工具栏中将添加一个输入框,指示当前缩放级别,并允许您通过输入数字来设置缩放级别。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Clicking a color while selecting a range of text will copy a link to the selection with "&color=..." appended.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在选择一段文本时点击一种颜色,将会复制一个链接,该链接附加有"&color=..."。')

regex.source: .setDesc("A color palette will be added to the toolbar of the PDF viewer.")
regex.target: .setDesc("PDF查看器的工具栏中将添加一个颜色调色板。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This color will be selected in the color palette in a newly opened PDF viewer.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在新打开的PDF查看器中,此颜色将在颜色调色板中被选中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, you can specify a different color for each color palette.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用,可以为每个颜色调色板指定不同的颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`When disabled${Ci.quietColorPaletteTooltip?"":" (default)"}, the tooltip will show the color name as well as the selected copy format and display text format. If enabled, only the color name will be shown.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`禁用时${Ci.quietColorPaletteTooltip?"":" (默认)"},提示将显示颜色名称以及选定的复制格式和显示文本格式。如果启用,则仅显示颜色名称。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("(Desktop & tablet only) Customize the behavior of the context menu that pops up when you right-click in the PDF viewer. For mobile users, see also the next section.")
regex.target: .setDesc("(仅限桌面和平板电脑) 自定义在PDF查看器中右键单击时弹出的上下文菜单的行为。对于移动用户,请参阅下一节。")

regex.source: .setDesc('You can customize the display text format in the setting "Copied text format > Display text format" below.')
regex.target: .setDesc('您可以在下面的设置"复制文本格式 > 显示文本格式"中自定义显示文本格式。')

regex.source: .setDesc('"Search on Google Scholar": Available when right-clicking citation links in PDFs.')
regex.target: .setDesc('"Google 学术搜索": 在PDF中右键点击引用链接时可用。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Available when right-clicking with no text selected.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在没有选择任何文本的情况下右键点击时可用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("In the context menu, the items (color, copy format and display text format) set in the color palette are selected by default. If this option is enabled, clicking a menu item will also update the color palette state and hence the default-selected items in the context menu as well.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在上下文菜单中,默认选中颜色调色板中设置的项目（颜色、复制格式和显示文本格式）。如果启用此选项,点击菜单项还将更新颜色调色板的状态,从而也更新上下文菜单中的默认选中项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to show the outline of a markdown file and a PDF file without key conflict.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过开启此选项,您可以使用相同的热键显示markdown文件和PDF文件的大纲,而不会发生键冲突。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enabling this will allow you to use the same hotkey to close the sidebar if it is already open.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项后,如果侧边栏已打开,您可以使用相同的热键关闭它。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to zoom in/out a PDF viewer or any other type of view without key conflict.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过开启此选项,您可以使用相同的热键放大/缩小PDF查看器或其他类型的视图,而不会发生键冲突。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The template format that will be used when copying a link to a selection or an annotation in PDF viewer. ")
regex.target: .setDesc("在PDF查看器中复制选择或注释的链接时使用的模板格式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, you can specify a different display text format for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用,可以从PDF工具栏的下拉菜单中为每个PDF查看器指定不同的显示文本格式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, you can specify a different action for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用,可以从PDF工具栏的下拉菜单中为每个PDF查看器指定不同的操作。")

regex.source: .setDesc("For example, you can use this to copy a link to the page when there is no selection.")
regex.target: .setDesc("例如,您可以使用此选项在没有选择任何文本时复制页面链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Speed up the process of copying & pasting PDF links to your notes with some automation. Note that you can't activate both of auto-focus and auto-paste at the same time.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过一些自动化加快将PDF链接复制粘贴到笔记的过程。注意,不能同时激活自动聚焦和自动粘贴。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`If enabled, the "Copy link to selection or annotation" command will be triggered automatically every time you select a range of text in a PDF viewer, meaning you don't even have to press a hotkey to copy a link.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果启用,每次在PDF查看器中选择一段文本时,“复制链接到选择或注释”命令将自动触发,这意味着您甚至不必按下热键来复制链接。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用了下一个设置,您还可以通过左侧边栏菜单中的图标切换自动聚焦。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can also toggle this mode via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您也可以通过命令切换此模式。更改此设置后重新加载插件以生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, a markdown file will be focused automatically after copying a link to PDF text selection or annotation.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,在复制PDF文本选择或注释的链接后,markdown文件将自动获得焦点。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Recommended if you prefer something less aggressive than auto-paste. You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您偏好比自动粘贴更温和的方式,推荐此选项。如果启用了下一个设置,您还可以通过左侧边栏菜单中的图标切换自动聚焦。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can also toggle auto-focus via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您也可以通过命令切换自动聚焦。更改此设置后重新加载插件以生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the copied link to PDF text selection or annotation will be automatically pasted into a markdown file right after copying.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,复制的PDF文本选择或注释的链接将在复制后立即自动粘贴到markdown文件中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can also toggle auto-paste via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用了下一个设置,您还可以通过左侧边栏菜单中的图标切换自动粘贴。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can also toggle auto-paste via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您也可以通过命令切换自动粘贴。更改此设置后重新加载插件以生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, auto-paste will focus on the editor after pasting.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,自动粘贴后将聚焦于编辑器。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the text selection in the PDF viewer will be automatically cleared after performing auto-pasting.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,执行自动粘贴后PDF查看器中的文本选择将自动清除。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, triggering auto-pasting will paste the copied text at the current cursor position if the target note is already opened. If disabled, the text will be always appended to the end of the note.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时,触发自动粘贴将在目标笔记已打开的情况下将复制的文本粘贴到当前光标位置。如果禁用,文本将始终追加到笔记末尾。")

regex.source: .setDesc("General settings that apply to both auto-focus and auto-paste.")
regex.target: .setDesc("适用于自动聚焦和自动粘贴的一般设置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This option will not affect the behavior of Hover Editor outside of PDF++.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此选项不会影响PDF++之外的Hover Editor行为。")

regex.source: .setDesc("After auto-pasting into a markdown file opened in the left or right sidebar, the sidebar will be automatically collapsed once it loses focus.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在左或右侧边栏中打开的markdown文件中自动粘贴后,一旦失去焦点,侧边栏将自动折叠。")

regex.source: .setDesc('This option can be useful especially when you set the previous option to "Hover Editor".')
regex.target: .setDesc('当您将前一个选项设置为“Hover Editor”时,此选项尤其有用。')

regex.source: .setDesc("When PDF++ cannot determine which markdown file to focus on or paste to, it will execute the command specified in the next option to let you pick a target file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当PDF++无法确定要聚焦或粘贴到哪个markdown文件时,它将执行下一个选项中指定的命令,让您选择目标文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The link will be auto-pasted into the first markdown file that you open within this time frame after the command is executed. If you don't open any markdown file during this time, the auto-paste will not occur. This option is not related to auto-focus.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在执行命令后,链接将在您在此时间段内打开的第一个markdown文件中自动粘贴。如果您在此期间没有打开任何markdown文件,自动粘贴将不会发生。此选项与自动聚焦无关。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Creates a new note and opens it in a new pane specified in the "How to open target markdown file when not opened" option.')
regex.target: .setDesc('创建一个新笔记并根据“未打开目标markdown文件时如何打开”选项中指定的方式在一个新窗格中打开它。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Note that turning on this option disables text selection in the annotation popup (e.g. modified date, author, etc).")
regex.target: .setDesc("请注意,启用此选项将禁用注释弹出窗口中的文本选择（例如修改日期、作者等）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This is the same behavior as the PDF viewers of some web browsers (e.g. Chrome/Firefox). You may have to reopen the PDF file after changing this option.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这与某些网络浏览器（如Chrome/Firefox）中的PDF查看器行为相同。更改此选项后,您可能需要重新打开PDF文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can turn this on and off with the toggle button in the PDF viewer toolbar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以通过PDF查看器工具栏中的切换按钮来开启或关闭此功能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, you can specify whether to write highlights to files for each PDF viewer.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用,您可以为每个PDF查看器指定是否将高亮写入文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, you can edit the text contents of annotations embedded in PDF files by clicking the "Edit" button in the annotation popup.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用,您可以通过点击注释弹出窗口中的“编辑”按钮来编辑嵌入PDF文件中的注释文本内容。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, you can delete annotations embedded in PDF files by clicking the "Delete" button in the annotation popup.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用,您可以通过点击注释弹出窗口中的“删除”按钮来删除嵌入PDF文件中的注释。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Make it easier to work with internal links embedded in PDF files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使处理嵌入PDF文件中的内部链接更加容易。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`You may want to turn this off to avoid conflicts with hover+${Nn}.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`您可能希望关闭此选项以避免与hover+${Nn}产生冲突。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('When enabled, clicking the "navigate back" (left arrow) button will take you back to the page you were originally viewing before clicking on an internal link in the PDF file.')
regex.target: .setDesc('当启用时,点击“返回”（左箭头）按钮将带您回到点击PDF文件中的内部链接之前所查看的页面。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Running this command while viewing a PDF file will copy a link, clicking which will open the PDF file at the current scroll position and zoom level.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在查看PDF文件时运行此命令将复制一个链接,点击该链接将按当前滚动位置和缩放级别打开PDF文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc('(Requires custom context menu & PDF editing enabled) After copying a link by the above actions, you can "paste" it to a selection in PDF to create a PDF internal link. To do this, right-click the selection and click "Paste copied link to selection".')
regex.target: .setDesc('(需要自定义上下文菜单和PDF编辑启用) 复制链接后,您可以将其“粘贴”到PDF中的选定区域以创建PDF内部链接。为此,请右击选定区域并点击“将复制的链接粘贴到选定区域”。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Specify whether PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection" should be surrounded by borders.')
regex.target: .setDesc('指定您通过“将复制的链接粘贴到选定区域”创建的PDF内部链接是否应带有边框。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Specify the border color of PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection".')
regex.target: .setDesc('指定您通过“将复制的链接粘贴到选定区域”创建的PDF内部链接的边框颜色。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Make it easier to work with external links embedded in PDF files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使处理嵌入PDF文件中的外部链接更加容易。")

regex.source: .setDesc("General settings for the PDF sidebar. The options specific to the outline and thumbnails are located in the corresponding sections below.")
regex.target: .setDesc("PDF侧边栏的一般设置。关于大纲和缩略图的具体选项位于下面相应的部分。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Requires reopening the tabs after changing this option.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改此选项后需要重新打开标签页。")
.setDesc("更改此选项后重新打开PDF文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Power up the outline view of the built-in PDF viewer: add, rename, or delete items via the right-click menu and the "Add to outline" command, drag & drop items to insert a section link, and more.')
regex.target: .setDesc('增强内置PDF查看器的大纲视图:通过右键菜单和“添加到大纲”命令添加、重命名或删除项目,拖放项目以插入章节链接等。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Reopen the tabs or reload the app after changing this option.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改此选项后重新打开标签页或重新加载应用程序。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This enables you to insert a section link with a custom format by right-clicking an item in the outline. Moreover, you will be able to add, rename, or delete outline items if PDF modification is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这允许您通过右击大纲中的项目以自定义格式插入章节链接。此外,如果启用了PDF修改,您还可以添加、重命名或删除大纲项目。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Grab an item in the outline and drop it to a markdown file to insert a section link. Changing this option requires reopening the tabs or reloading the app.")
regex.target: .setDesc("抓取大纲中的项目并将其拖放到markdown文件中以插入章节链接。更改此选项需要重新打开标签页或重新加载应用程序。")

regex.source: .setDesc('You can copy PDF outline as a markdown list or headings using the commands "Copy outline as markdown list" and "Copy outline as markdown headings".')
regex.target: .setDesc('您可以使用“将大纲复制为markdown列表”和“将大纲复制为markdown标题”的命令将PDF大纲复制为markdown列表或标题。')

regex.source: .setDesc("You don't need to include leading hyphens in the template.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您无需在模板中包含前置连字符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You don't need to include leading hashes in the template.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您无需在模板中包含前置井号。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The copied headings will start at this level.")
regex.target: .setDesc("复制的标题将从这一级开始。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`You may want to turn this off to avoid conflicts with hover+${Nn}`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`您可能希望关闭此选项以避免与hover+${Nn}产生冲突。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("This enables you to copy a page link with a custom display text format specified in the PDF toolbar by right-clicking a thumbnail. Moreover, you will be able to insert, delete, extract pages if PDF modification is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这允许您通过右击缩略图并在PDF工具栏中指定自定义显示文本格式来复制页面链接。此外,如果启用了PDF修改,您还可以插入、删除、提取页面。")

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, the newly created PDF file will be opened after running the commands "Extract this page to a new file" or "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用,执行“将此页提取到新文件”或“在此页处分割此PDF为两个文件”的命令后,新创建的PDF文件将被打开。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Applies to the commands "Insert page before/after this page".')
regex.target: .setDesc('适用于"在此页前/后插入页面"的命令。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Applies to the commands "Extract this page to a new file" and "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".')
regex.target: .setDesc('适用于“将此页提取到新文件”和“在此页处分割此PDF为两个文件”的命令。')

regex.source: .setDesc("This option will be ignored when you open a PDF link in a tab in the same split as the PDF viewer.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当您在与PDF查看器相同的分割区的标签页中打开PDF链接时,此选项将被忽略。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When you open a link to a PDF file that's already opened, Obsidian's default behavior causes the zoom level to be reset to fit the width of the PDF file to the viewer. If enabled, the current zoom level will be preserved. This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当您打开已打开的PDF文件的链接时,默认情况下,Obsidian会将缩放级别重置为适合PDF文件宽度至查看器。如果启用,当前的缩放级别将被保留。此选项在PDF嵌入中将被忽略。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.")
.setDesc(`Press ${Tn("Mod").toLowerCase()} while hovering a PDF link to actually open it if the target PDF is already opened in another tab.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`当目标PDF已在另一个标签页中打开时,悬停在PDF链接上并按下${Tn("Mod").toLowerCase()}来实际打开它。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Obsidian lets you specify the height of a PDF embed by appending "&height=..." to a link, and this also applies to popover previews. Enable this option if you want to ignore the height parameter in popover previews.')
regex.target: .setDesc('Obsidian允许您通过在链接后附加"&height=..."来指定PDF嵌入的高度,这也适用于弹出预览。如果您想忽略弹出预览中的高度参数,请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Double-clicking a PDF embed will open the embedded file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("双击PDF嵌入将打开嵌入的文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Regardless of the "two page" layout setting in existing PDF viewer, PDF embeds and PDF popover previews will be always displayed in "single page" layout. You can still turn it on for each embed by clicking the "two page" button in the toolbar, if shown.')
regex.target: .setDesc('无论现有的PDF查看器中的“两页”布局设置如何,PDF嵌入和PDF弹出预览始终将以“单页”布局显示。如果显示了工具栏中的“两页”按钮,您仍然可以为每个嵌入开启此功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc('You can toggle this on and off with the "Show only backlinks in the current page" button at the top right of the backlinks pane.')
regex.target: .setDesc('您可以使用反链面板右上角的“仅显示当前页的反链”按钮来开启或关闭此功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If turned off, only backlinks to specific text selections, annotations or locations will be shown when filtering the backlinks page by page.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果关闭,过滤反链页面时,仅显示指向特定文本选择、注释或位置的反链。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hovering your mouse over highlighted text or annotation will also highlight the corresponding item in the backlink pane.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将鼠标悬停在高亮文本或注释上也会在反链面板中高亮对应的项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("In the backlinks pane, hover your mouse over an backlink item to highlight the corresponding text or annotation in the PDF viewer. This option requires reopening or switching tabs to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在反链面板中,将鼠标悬停在一个反链项上以在PDF查看器中高亮对应的文本或注释。此选项需要重新打开或切换标签页才能生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc('To add a new color, click the "+" button in the "highlight colors" setting above.')
regex.target: .setDesc('要添加新颜色,请点击上面“高亮颜色”设置中的“+”按钮。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Open PDF links with the OS-defined default application for PDF files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用操作系统定义的默认应用程序打开PDF链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Open the same PDF file both in the default app and Obsidian at the same time.")
regex.target: .setDesc("同时在默认应用程序和Obsidian中打开相同的PDF文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When you focus on a PDF file in Obsidian, the external app will also focus on the same file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当您在Obsidian中聚焦于一个PDF文件时,外部应用程序也将聚焦于同一个文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Otherwise, the focus will be moved to the external app.")
regex.target: .setDesc("否则,焦点将移动到外部应用程序。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Reopen the PDF viewers after changing this option.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改此选项后重新打开PDF查看器。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`They are used preferentially from left to right, so you might want to put the easier-to-reach keys first. This is the same as Tridactyl's "hintchars" option.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`它们从左到右优先使用,因此您可能希望将更容易触及的键放在前面。这与Tridactyl的"hintchars"选项相同。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Space-separated list of "link"/"annot"/"backlink" or "all". Run ":help :hint" for the details.')
regex.target: .setDesc('由空格分隔的"link"/"annot"/"backlink"或"all"列表。运行":help :hint"以获取详细信息。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, you can use j/k/h/l keys, instead of the arrow keys, to navigate through context menu items in the PDF viewer.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,您可以使用j/k/h/l键,而不是箭头键,在PDF查看器的上下文菜单项之间导航。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The size of scroll when one of the jkhl keys is pressed once.")
.setDesc("The speed of scroll when pressing and holding down the jkhl keys.")
regex.target: .setDesc("按下并持续按住jkhl键时的滚动速度。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, all matches will be highlighted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,所有匹配项都将被高亮。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Incremental search: while typing the search query, update the search results after every keystroke. If disabled, the results will be shown only after pressing Enter.")
regex.target: .setDesc("增量搜索:在输入搜索查询时,每敲一次键盘就更新搜索结果。如果禁用,则只有在按下Enter键后才显示结果。")

regex.source: .setDesc('For example, when you copy a link to a text selection in a PDF file, the status "Link copied" will be displayed in the PDF toolbar.')
regex.target: .setDesc('例如,当您复制PDF文件中文本选择的链接时,“链接已复制”状态将显示在PDF工具栏中。')

regex.source: .setDesc('The "Create new PDF" command will create a new PDF file in the location specified here.')
regex.target: .setDesc('“创建新PDF”命令将在此处指定的位置创建一个新的PDF文件。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Newly created PDFs will appear under this folder.")
regex.target: .setDesc("新创建的PDF文件将出现在此文件夹下。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Such whitespace can be introduced as a result of poor post-processing of OCR (optical character recognition). Enable this option to remove it when copying links to text selections.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这种空白可能是由于OCR（光学字符识别）处理不当造成的。启用此选项可以在复制文本选择的链接时去除这些空白。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Provide the "PATH" environment variable for PDF++ to run shell commands without the full paths specified. In MacOS and Linux, you can run "echo $PATH" in Terminal and then copy & paste the result here. Currently, it will be used only when you run ":!<command>" in Vim mode.')
regex.target: .setDesc('为PDF++提供“PATH”环境变量,以便在不指定完整路径的情况下运行shell命令。在MacOS和Linux中,您可以在终端中运行"echo $PATH",然后将结果复制粘贴到这里。目前,它仅在Vim模式下运行":<command>"时使用。')

regex.source: .setDesc("You can find more options in Style Settings > PDF++.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以在样式设置 > PDF++ 中找到更多选项。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Label the pages in this range continuing from the previous range")
regex.target: .setTooltip("从此范围的前一页开始标记此范围内的页面")

regex.source: .appendText(`Your Obsidian installer is outdated and likely to be incompatible with the latest ${t}. Please download the latest installer from Obsidian's website and re-install the Obsidian app.`)
regex.target: .appendText(`您的Obsidian安装程序已过时,可能与最新的${t}不兼容。请从Obsidian官网下载最新安装程序并重新安装Obsidian应用。`)

regex.source: .appendText("When enabled, the PDF viewer will zoom to fit the rectangular selection when you open a link to it. Otherwise, the viewer will keep the current zoom level. ")
regex.target: .appendText("启用时,当您打开指向它的链接时,PDF查看器将放大以适应矩形选择区域。否则,查看器将保持当前的缩放级别。 ")

regex.source: .appendText(" is enabled, it will be prioritized and the context menu will not be shown.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 已启用,它将被优先处理,并且不会显示上下文菜单。")

regex.source: .appendText(" Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 更改此设置后重新加载插件以生效。")

regex.target: .appendText("更改此选项后,请重新打开标签或重新加载应用程序。")

description:":0 - Go to the first page (same as :1)",func:()=>n.pdfViewer&&(n.pdfViewer.currentPageNumber=1)},{id:"$",description:":$ - Go to the last page."
regex.target: description:":0 - 跳转到第一页（与 :1 相同）",func:()=>n.pdfViewer&&(n.pdfViewer.currentPageNumber=1)},{id:"$",description:":$ - 跳转到最后一页."

regex.source: description:":go[to[page]] <page> - Go to the specified page. If the PDF has page labels, the argument is treated as a page label. Otherwise, it is treated as a page number."
regex.target: description:":go[to[page]] <page> - 跳转到指定页。如果PDF有页标签,则参数被视为页标签。否则,它被视为页码."

regex.source: description:":zoom <number> - Set the zoom level to <number> percent."
regex.target: description:":zoom <number> - 设置缩放级别为 <number> 百分比."

regex.source: description:":outline or :toc - Show the outline view."
regex.target: description:":outline or :toc - 显示大纲视图."
description:":unm[ap] <key> - 在所有模式下取消映射 <key>."
description:":nun[map] <key> - 在普通模式下取消映射 <key>."
description:":vu[nmap] <key> - 在视觉模式下取消映射 <key>."
description:":ou[nmap] <key> - 在大纲模式下取消映射 <key>."

regex.source: description:`:js[command] <code>: Execute the given javascript <code> in a context where "this" points to a "${Vo.name}" object.`
regex.target: description:`:js[command] <code>: 在一个 "this" 指向 "${Vo.name}" 对象的上下文中执行给定的javascript <code>.`

regex.source: description:`:jsfile <path> - Execute the javascript code in the file at <path> (relative to the vault root; can be just the filename if it's unique). It can be any plain text file with arbitrary file extension. The code will be evaluated in a context where "this" points to a "${Vo.name}" object.`
regex.target: description:`:jsfile <path> - 执行位于 <path> 的文件中的javascript代码（相对于库根目录；如果是唯一的,可以仅提供文件名）。它可以是任何具有任意文件扩展名的纯文本文件。代码将在一个 "this" 指向 "${Vo.name}" 对象的上下文中进行评估.`

regex.source: description:":obcommand <command-id> - Execute the Obsidian command with the specified ID. Inspired by esm's awesome Vimrc Support plugin."
regex.target: description:":obcommand <command-id> - 执行指定ID的Obsidian命令。受esm的优秀Vimrc支持插件启发."

regex.source: t="Can't embed page with missing Contents"
regex.target: t="无法嵌入缺少内容的页面"

regex.source: t="Found mismatched contexts while embedding pages. All pages in the array passed to `PDFDocument.embedPages()` must be from the same document."
regex.target: t="在嵌入页面时发现不匹配的上下文。传递给 `PDFDocument.embedPages()` 的数组中的所有页面必须来自同一文档."

regex.source: t="Attempted to set invalid field value"
t="Attempted to select multiple values for single-select field"
regex.target: t="尝试为单选字段选择多个值"

regex.source: t="Input document to `PDFDocument.load` is encrypted. You can use `PDFDocument.load(..., { ignoreEncryption: true })` if you wish to load the document anyways."
regex.target: t="输入到 `PDFDocument.load` 的文档已加密。如果您希望无论如何加载文档,可以使用 `PDFDocument.load(..., { ignoreEncryption: true })`."

regex.source: t="Input to `PDFDocument.embedFont` was a custom font, but no `fontkit` instance was found. You must register a `fontkit` instance with `PDFDocument.registerFontkit(...)` before embedding custom fonts."
regex.target: t="输入到 `PDFDocument.embedFont` 的是一个自定义字体,但未找到 `fontkit` 实例。在嵌入自定义字体之前,您必须使用 `PDFDocument.registerFontkit(...)` 注册一个 `fontkit` 实例."

regex.source: t="A `page` passed to `PDFDocument.addPage` or `PDFDocument.insertPage` was from a different (foreign) PDF document. If you want to copy pages from one PDFDocument to another, you must use `PDFDocument.copyPages(...)` to copy the pages before adding or inserting them."
regex.target: t="传递给 `PDFDocument.addPage` 或 `PDFDocument.insertPage` 的 `page` 来自不同的（外部）PDF文档。如果您想从一个PDF文档复制页面到另一个,您必须使用 `PDFDocument.copyPages(...)` 复制页面,然后再添加或插入它们."

regex.source: t="PDFDocument has no pages so `PDFDocument.removePage` cannot be called"
regex.target: t="PDFDocument 没有页面,因此不能调用 `PDFDocument.removePage`"

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(["You can embed a specified rectangular area from a PDF page into your note. [Learn more](https://ryotaushio.github.io/obsidian-pdf-plus/embedding-rectangular-selections.html)"],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(["您可以将PDF页面中指定的矩形区域嵌入到您的笔记中。[了解更多](https://ryotaushio.github.io/obsidian-pdf-plus/embedding-rectangular-selections.html)"],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(["You can also disable this option and choose to use your own custom [CSS snippets](https://help.obsidian.md/Extending+Obsidian/CSS+snippets). See our [README](https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-pdf-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#css-customization) for the details."],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(["您还可以禁用此选项，并选择使用您自己的自定义 [CSS片段](https://help.obsidian.md/Extending+Obsidian/CSS+snippets)。有关详情，请参阅我们的 [README](https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-pdf-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#css-customization)。"],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(["This format will be also used when copying a link to a selection or an annotation from the context menu."],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(["当从上下文菜单复制选择或注释的链接时，也会使用此格式。"],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(["You can leave this blank if you don't want to use a template.","You can use `file`, `folder`, `app`, and other global variables such as `moment`."],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(["如果您不想使用模板，可以留空。","您可以使用 `file`、`folder`、`app` 以及其他全局变量，如 `moment`。"],d.descEl)
.renderMarkdown(["需要启用 [Surfing](obsidian://show-plugin?id=surfing) 插件版本0.9.9或更高。"],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(["You can trigger full-text search by opening a link to a PDF file with a search query appended, e.g. `[[file.pdf#search=keyword]]`."],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(["您可以通过打开带有搜索查询附加的PDF文件链接来触发全文搜索，例如 `[[file.pdf#search=keyword]]`。"],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(['Add, insert, delete or extract PDF pages via commands and **automatically update all the related links in the entire vault**. The "Editing PDF files directly" option has to be enabled to use these features.'],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(['通过命令添加、插入、删除或提取PDF页面，并**自动更新整个仓库中所有相关的链接**。要使用这些功能，必须启用“直接编辑PDF文件”选项。'],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(['If this option is left blank or the active file is not a PDF, "Untitled \\*" will be used (if the language is set to English). You can use the following variables: `file`, `folder`, `app`, and other global variables such as `moment`.'],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(['如果此选项留空或活动文件不是PDF，“Untitled \\*”将被使用（如果语言设置为英语）。您可以使用以下变量：`file`、`folder`、`app`，以及其他全局变量，如`moment`。'],d.descEl)

regex.source: .renderMarkdown(['PDF++ will not modify PDF files themselves unless you turn on this option. The author assumes no responsibility for any data corruption. Please make sure you have a backup of your files.'],d.descEl)
regex.target: .renderMarkdown(['除非开启此选项，否则PDF++不会修改PDF文件本身。作者不对任何数据损坏负责。请确保您有文件的备份。'],d.descEl)

regex.source: > - You can easily navigate through the settings by clicking the icons in the header above.
regex.target: > - 您可以通过点击上方标题中的图标轻松导航设置。

regex.source: > - Some settings below require reopening tabs or reloading the plugin to take effect.
regex.target: > - 下面的一些设置需要重新打开标签页或重新加载插件才能生效。

regex.source: By allowing PDF++ to modify PDF files directly, you can:
regex.target: 允许PDF++直接修改PDF文件，您可以：

regex.source: - Add, edit and delete highlights and links in PDF files.
regex.target: - 添加、编辑和删除PDF文件中的高亮和链接。

regex.source: - Add, insert, delete or extract PDF pages and auto-update links.
regex.target: - 添加、插入、删除或提取PDF页面并自动更新链接。

regex.source: - Add, rename, move and delete outline items.
regex.target: - 添加、重命名、移动和删除大纲项目。
